sourcesContent:
<template>
  <component :is="currentLayoutComponent">
    <router-view />
  </component>
</template>

<script>
import HomeView from '@/views/HomeView.vue';
import Login from '@/views/login/Login.vue';

export default {
  components: {
    DefaultLayout,
    AdminLayout,
  },
  computed: {
    currentLayoutComponent() {
      // Determine which layout to use based on the route's meta field
      // or other conditions (e.g., user authentication state)
      const layoutName = this.$route.meta.layout || 'default'; // default to 'default'
      switch (layoutName) {
        case 'admin':
          return 'AdminLayout';
        case 'default':
        default:
          return 'DefaultLayout';
      }
    },
  },
};
</script>
